title: Cloud Pack Manifest
description: JSON Schema for cloud pack manifest files

name.description: Pack identifier using lowercase letters and hyphens only

displayName.description: Human-readable display name for the pack

agents.description: Agent file references for this pack

complianceReviewer.description: Optional compliance reviewer agent file reference

skills.description: List of skill identifiers included in this pack

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the pack

mcpServers.description: Optional path to MCP servers configuration file

reviewers.description: Optional list of reviewer agent file references
